001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import com.google.common.base.Preconditions;
004import java.util.Objects;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Guithium;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.Vec4;
007import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.texture.Texture;
008import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
009import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
010import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
011
012/**
013 * Represents an image element.
014 */
015public class Image extends Rect<Image> {
016    /**
017     * The default tiled dirt background used on a lot of options type screens.
018     */
019    public static final Image TILED_DIRT_BACKGROUND = Image.of(Guithium.MOD_ID + ":tiled_dirt")
020            .setTexture(Texture.DIRT)
021            .setVertexColor(0xFF404040)
022            .setTileModifier(32.0F);
023
024    private Texture texture;
025    private Vec4 uv;
026    private Integer vertex;
027    private Float tile;
028
029    /**
030     * Create a new image element.
031     *
032     * @param key Unique identifier
033     */
034    public Image(@NotNull String key) {
035        this(Key.of(key));
036    }
037
038    /**
039     * Create a new image element.
040     *
041     * @param key Unique identifier
042     */
043    public Image(@NotNull Key key) {
044        super(key, Type.IMAGE);
045    }
046
047    /**
048     * Create a new image element.
049     *
050     * @param key Unique identifier
051     * @return New image element
052     */
053    @NotNull
054    public static Image of(@NotNull String key) {
055        return of(Key.of(key));
056    }
057
058    /**
059     * Create a new image element.
060     *
061     * @param key Unique identifier
062     * @return New image element
063     */
064    @NotNull
065    public static Image of(@NotNull Key key) {
066        return new Image(key);
067    }
068
069    /**
070     * Get the image's texture.
071     *
072     * @return Image texture
073     */
074    @NotNull
075    public Texture getTexture() {
076        return this.texture;
077    }
078
079    /**
080     * Set the image's texture.
081     *
082     * @param texture Image texture
083     * @return This image
084     */
085    @NotNull
086    public Image setTexture(@NotNull Texture texture) {
087        Preconditions.checkNotNull(texture, "Texture cannot be null");
088        this.texture = texture;
089        return this;
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * Get the texture UV.
094     * <p>
095     * If null, default UV of <code>0,0,1,1</code> will be used.
096     *
097     * @return Texture UV
098     */
099    @Nullable
100    public Vec4 getUV() {
101        return this.uv;
102    }
103
104    /**
105     * Set the texture UV.
106     * <p>
107     * If null, default UV of <code>0,0,1,1</code> will be used.
108     *
109     * @param uv Texture UV
110     * @return This image
111     */
112    @NotNull
113    public Image setUV(@Nullable Vec4 uv) {
114        this.uv = uv;
115        return this;
116    }
117
118    /**
119     * Get the vertex color modifier.
120     * <p>
121     * This is a color modifier used in mojang's `position_tex_color` fragment
122     * shader to control how much of a texture's colors show through.
123     * <p>
124     * Eg, a modifier of `0xFF00FFFF` will remove all red from the texture.
125     * <p>
126     * If null, default vertex color of <code>0xFFFFFFFF</code> (opaque white) will be used.
127     *
128     * @return Vertex color modifier
129     */
130    @Nullable
131    public Integer getVertexColor() {
132        return this.vertex;
133    }
134
135    /**
136     * Set the vertex color modifier.
137     * <p>
138     * This is a color modifier used in mojang's `position_tex_color` fragment
139     * shader to control how much of a texture's colors show through.
140     * <p>
141     * Eg, a modifier of `0xFF00FFFF` will remove all red from the texture.
142     * <p>
143     * If null, default vertex color of <code>0xFFFFFFFF</code> (opaque white) will be used.
144     *
145     * @param color Vertex color modifier
146     * @return This image
147     */
148    @NotNull
149    public Image setVertexColor(@Nullable Integer color) {
150        this.vertex = color;
151        return this;
152    }
153
154    /**
155     * Get the image's tile modifier.
156     * <p>
157     * This is used to divide the UV into tiled segments on each axis.
158     * <p>
159     * Eg, a value of 32 is used on vanilla option screens with the dirt texture
160     * in order to get the tiled effect. This does <em>not</em> mean it is tiled 32 times.
161     * <p>
162     * If null, no tile modifier will be used. If not null and <code>{@link #getUV()}</code> is null,
163     * then width and height of the image will replace the UV before applying the tile modifier.
164     *
165     * @return Tile modifier
166     */
167    @Nullable
168    public Float getTileModifier() {
169        return this.tile;
170    }
171
172    /**
173     * Set the image's tile modifier.
174     * <p>
175     * This is used to divide the UV into tiled segments on each axis.
176     * <p>
177     * Eg, a value of 32 is used on vanilla option screens with the dirt texture
178     * in order to get the tiled effect. This does <em>not</em> mean it is tiled 32 times.
179     * <p>
180     * If null, no tile modifier will be used. If not null and <code>{@link #getUV()}</code> is null,
181     * then width and height of the image will replace the UV before applying the tile modifier.
182     *
183     * @param tile Tile modifier
184     * @return This image
185     */
186    @NotNull
187    public Image setTileModifier(@Nullable Float tile) {
188        this.tile = tile;
189        return this;
190    }
191
192    @Override
193    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
194        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
195            return false;
196        }
197        Image other = (Image) obj;
198        return Objects.equals(getTexture(), other.getTexture())
199                && Objects.equals(getUV(), other.getUV())
200                && Objects.equals(getVertexColor(), other.getVertexColor())
201                && Objects.equals(getTileModifier(), other.getTileModifier());
202    }
203
204    @Override
205    public int hashCode() {
206        // pacifies codefactor.io
207        return super.hashCode();
208    }
209}
